title: Programmatic-path purge finish — delete scripts/spike + vestigial dogfood gateway-legacy + tidy comments; committed banned-pattern guard test

video.note: No UI behavior to film — a code/file deletion + a committed regression guard. The MR-wave's demonstrable behavior (router view, simulator) is filmed at MR2; this slice's evidence is the green guard test.

notes: Substrate already 95% purged by the PTY-everywhere commits (gateway-legacy deleted, GARRISON_GATEWAY_ENGINE gone, spawnClaude/spawn-soul on PTY). This slice finished the tail: deleted scripts/spike/* (22 disconnected POC files, zero production imports), removed the vestigial compositions/dogfood-orch/.../gateway-legacy.mjs install artifact, and tidied 3 stale comments naming @anthropic-ai/--print (coding-subagent.mjs, orchestrator-projection.ts, legacy-voice.tsx). tests/programmatic-purge.test.ts is the durable regression guard (scans src/packages/fittings/scripts via git ls-files; tests/ and docs/ are tests-of-the-ban, excluded by construction). Satisfies brief §3 token programmatic-purge-ok.
